fingerprints.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

seo.title: Louisiana Pharmacist License Reciprocity - How to Transfer Your License (2026)
seo.description: Already licensed as a pharmacist? Here's whether your license transfers to Louisiana - compact status, endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.
seo.keywords: pharmacist license reciprocity louisiana, how to transfer pharmacist license to louisiana, pharmacist compact louisiana, louisiana pharmacist endorsement application

license_types.title: RPh, PharmD
license_types.description: The standard credential to practice as a pharmacist in Louisiana.

steps.title: Register for an Account
steps.description: Navigate to the LABP Online Portal and click 'Click Here to Register for Online Services'. Provide your email, create a password, and enter personal details including your Social Security Number and Date of Birth to establish your online account.

steps.title: Log in and Start Application
steps.description: Log into your newly created account on the LABP Online Portal. From the dashboard, select the appropriate application type (e.g., 'Pharmacist - Examination' for new licenses or 'Pharmacist - Reciprocity' for endorsement).

steps.title: Complete Online Application Form
steps.description: Fill out all required sections of the online application form within the LABP Online Portal, providing personal information, educational background, and professional history as requested.

steps.title: Submit Required Documents
steps.description: Upload all necessary supporting documents directly through the LABP Online Portal as specified in the application instructions, which may include official transcripts, internship affidavits, and score transfer requests for NAPLEX/MPJE from NABP.

steps.title: Pay Application Fee
steps.description: Submit the required non-refundable application fee using a credit or debit card through the secure payment system within the LABP Online Portal.

steps.title: Complete Criminal Background Check
steps.description: Follow the instructions provided by the Louisiana Board of Pharmacy to complete a mandatory criminal background check through their designated vendor. This process typically requires fingerprint submission.

documents.detail: Sent directly from your educational institution.
Official verification of passing the NAPLEX and MPJE.

provisional_text: Some states offer an intern or provisional license for graduates actively accumulating required hours or waiting to take the NAPLEX.
reciprocity_text: Pharmacists licensed in another state can often apply via license transfer (reciprocity) through the NABP, though most states still require passing their specific MPJE.

faqs.question: How much does a Louisiana pharmacist license cost?
faqs.answer: The initial application and licensing fee varies by state. Check the specific fee breakdown above.

faqs.question: Is the MPJE required in all states?
faqs.answer: Almost all states require passing their state-specific Multistate Pharmacy Jurisprudence Examination (MPJE) to verify knowledge of local pharmacy laws.

faqs.question: Does Louisiana have reciprocity for pharmacists?
faqs.answer: No interstate compact currently covers pharmacist practice in Louisiana. To work in Louisiana, apply for licensure by endorsement through the state board.

faqs.question: How long does it take to transfer my pharmacist license to Louisiana?
faqs.answer: Most endorsement applications take 4 to 6 Weeks.

faqs.question: Can I start working in Louisiana while my endorsement application is processing?
faqs.answer: A temporary or provisional credential is available while the full endorsement application is pending.

reciprocity.notes: Pharmacists licensed in another state can often apply via license transfer (reciprocity) through the NABP, though most states still require passing their specific MPJE.

hero.title: Become a Pharmacist in Louisiana
hero.dek: To apply for a pharmacist license in Louisiana, create an account and submit your application through the LABP Online Portal.

official_links.registration_steps: On the LABP Online Portal login page, click 'Click Here to Register for Online Services'. Provide an email address, create a password, and enter personal details including your Social Security Number and Date of Birth to create your account.
